tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"HPATH=$(which hping3 2>/dev/null); if [ -n \"$HPATH\" ]; then mv \"$HPATH\" \"${HPATH}.disabled\" && echo \"renamed:$HPATH\"; else echo \"hping3_not_found\"; fi; ls -l /usr/bin/hping3* /usr/sbin/hping3* /usr/local/bin/hping3* 2>/dev/null || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
HPATH=$(which hping3 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$HPPATH" ]; then mv "$HPATH" "${HPATH}.disabled" && echo "renamed:$HPATH"; else echoo "hping3_not_found"; fi; ls -l /usr/bin/hping3* /usr/sbin/hping3* /usr/local/binn/hping3* 2>/dev/null || true
renamed:/usr/sbin/hping3
-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root 141784 Apr  1  2024  /usr/sbin/hping3.disabled
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -L OUTPUT -n -v || true; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp -j DROP 2>/dev/null || iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -n -v --line-numbers"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -L OUTPUT -n -v || true; iptables -C OOUTPUT -p icmp -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null ||| iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPPT; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp -j DROP 2>/dev/null || iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp  -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -n -v --line-numbers
